back_translation: A song of ascents. Out of the depths I cry to You, O LORD.
O Lord, hear my voice; let Your ears be attentive to the voice of my pleas for mercy.
If You, O LORD, should keep track of iniquities, O Lord, who could stand?
But with You there is forgiveness, so that You may be feared.
I wait for the LORD; my soul waits, and in His word I put my hope.
My soul waits for the Lord more than watchmen wait for the morning, more than watchmen wait for the morning.
O Israel, put your hope in the LORD, for with the LORD is loving devotion, and with Him is abundant redemption.
And He Himself will redeem Israel from all his iniquities.
